title: Principal Frontend Developer at DRDO Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at DRDO Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
